title: Minecraft: At Night - ELS Add-on
description: The first Enhanced Loading Screens add-on.
body:
# **Enhanced Loading Screens: At Night Add-on**

- **Enhanced Loading Screens: At Night** is the first ELS add-on made by me, so i hope you like the images.

## Information:

- This add-on has 8 built-in images, so you only have 8 variants.
- If you use this add-on, the default image will no longer be displayed.
- To use this add-on, you will need the [**Enhanced Loading Screens Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-loading-screens).
- Feel free to use this add-on wherever you want.

## **My personal favorite image:**
![My personal favorite image.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/370434f0b8f5ab1bf65d7577781a9bb00038c00e.webp)

Terrain datapack: [**Terralith**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith).

Shaders: [**Solas Shader**](https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader).

**Well, if you want to leave me a tip, https://ko-fi.com/mateusmg2010**

**That's all...**

**Thanks for downloading :)**
